source_title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
claim: Agent Laboratory accepts a human-provided research idea and progresses through literature review, experimentation, and report writing to produce a research report and code repository while allowing human feedback at each stage.
snippet: The paper introduces an autonomous LLM-based framework for the research process with three stages: literature review, experimentation, and report writing.
risk_note: 正文已避免把实验结果写成确定性胜利，发布前仍建议人工复核 PDF 指标。

source_title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
claim: The authors report an 84% decrease in research expenses compared to previous autonomous research methods.
snippet: The abstract reports a significant reduction in research expenses, achieving an 84% decrease compared to previous autonomous research methods.
risk_note: 成本口径来自作者论文，正文使用「论文说」和「相比此前自主科研方法」限定。

snippet: The GitHub repository provides the project code and citation metadata for arXiv:2501.04227.
risk_note: 仓库内容可能更新，发布前可再人工打开核验。

source_title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants, Findings of ACL EMNLP 2025
claim: Agent Laboratory was published in Findings of ACL: EMNLP 2025.
snippet: The ACL Anthology entry lists the paper in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: EMNLP 2025.
